prompt: I've got a FastAPI service at plugins/quality-assurance/skills/smoke-test/evals/fixtures/fastapi-app with zero tests. Can you add a smoke suite for it?

assertions.text: Proposes a focused list of 5-10 concrete checks before generating any code
Generated tests target the actual routes that exist in the fixture (e.g. /health, /users/{id}, /orders) rather than invented endpoints
Output uses a Python-native test framework appropriate for FastAPI (pytest + httpx/TestClient or similar) rather than a generic curl script
Marks environment-specific values like base URL or auth tokens with a clear TODO/placeholder rather than hardcoding production values
